summary: Iteration 26 - Comprehensive Notification System Testing Complete. Fixed critical bug where API endpoint was overwriting helper function. All 21 backend tests pass. Frontend NotificationCenter verified working for both client and enterprise users.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Function name collision between helper function create_notification() (line 756) and API endpoint create_notification() (line 4179). Renamed API endpoint to create_notification_endpoint() to prevent TypeError.
seed_data_creation: Test orders and reviews created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Notification system fully functional. All CRUD operations work. Automatic notifications generated on: orders (client + enterprise), reviews (enterprise), trainings (client + enterprise), job applications (enterprise). NotificationCenter component shows different filters based on user type.

notifications_crud.GET /api/notifications: PASS - Returns notifications list with unread_count
notifications_crud.PUT /api/notifications/{id}/read: PASS - Marks single notification as read
notifications_crud.PUT /api/notifications/read-all: PASS - Marks all notifications as read

automatic_notifications.order_creates_client_notification: PASS - Client receives order_placed and cashback_earned notifications

frontend_notification_center.client_filters: PASS - Shows: Tout, Non lues, Commandes, Cashback, Amis, Messages
frontend_notification_center.enterprise_filters: PASS - Shows: Tout, Non lues, Commandes, Avis, Emplois, Formations
frontend_notification_center.notification_badge: PASS - Shows unread count in header
frontend_notification_center.notification_items: PASS - Shows notification type icons and colors

bug_fixed.issue: TypeError: create_notification() got an unexpected keyword argument 'notification_type'
bug_fixed.root_cause: API endpoint @api_router.post('/notifications') async def create_notification() was overwriting the helper function create_notification() defined earlier in the file
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Renamed API endpoint function from create_notification to create_notification_endpoint
